law: In visionOS 26, fully immersive apps that render their own content using Metal can also use hover effects.
If your app needs more, you can also use 16-bit integers, which allows up to 65,534 tracking areas, but also increases your app’s memory consumption.
To work around the fact that some pixels don’t reference the correct draw call identifier, it implements a compute shader to ensure the draw call for any specific pixel is correct.
If you plan to let people override the maximum render quality, make sure you thoroughly test performance.
